overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street featuring neon holographic advertisements, mixed traditional Japanese and modern architecture, and light vehicle traffic. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), following characters through wet urban streets illuminated by green and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with holographic advertising display

events.description: the pedestrian with red headwear moves out of frame as camera continues forward

entered.detail: large glowing green wireframe holographic display cube showing abstract graphics
futuristic police vehicle with NCPD markings parked on the right street side
low-rise buildings with traditional East Asian architectural styling and tiled roofs
tall illuminated glass and steel towers with glowing windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian with a red beanie along a wet city sidewalk at night. A large green holographic advertising cube glows brightly on the right, while an NCPD police car sits parked nearby. Traditional low-rise buildings contrast with distant modern skyscrapers illuminated against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban multi-lane street with mixed traditional and modern architecture

events.description: NCPD police car passes by on the left side of the street
multiple vehicles drive past on the wet road surface

agents.ego_description: walking alone down the city street observing passing traffic and the mix of traditional and futuristic architecture

tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
police vehicle moving along the left street side

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking down the wet city street alone, passing by an NCPD police car and various vehicles. The street features a mix of traditional Japanese-style buildings and modern structures, with palm trees lining the sidewalk and a covered bus stop visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection approach with street signage

approaching intersection with red traffic light and crosswalk

street sign indicating Highway 101 above the intersection
tall pole with red traffic light and pedestrian signals

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian in a yellow jacket approaching a city intersection. A prominent red 'Carnitas' sign and Highway 101 signage become visible as the camera nears the crosswalk. The traffic light shows red as vehicles pass through the intersection ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that transitions from a neon-lit sidewalk into a busy urban intersection. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in a red beanie past a glowing green holographic advertising cube and a parked NCPD police car, where low-rise traditional buildings stand against a backdrop of distant skyscrapers. As the camera continues forward, the view opens up to reveal palm trees lining the wet pavement and a covered bus stop nestled among a mix of Japanese-style and modern architecture. The scene then shifts toward a city crossing, following a pedestrian in a yellow jacket as a prominent red Carnitas sign and Highway 101 signage emerge from the gloom. Finally, the camera reaches the edge of the crosswalk, pausing before a red traffic light as vehicles stream through the intersection ahead.
